segments.text: Whoa, that's a beautiful finish!
segments.original_text: えってきた?かわいい仕上がりを見ている

segments.text: Well, when you set up for a ledge tech, that getup naturally comes out regardless, right?
segments.original_text: まあ崖受け身用に仕込むとどうしてもあそこ返し上がり出てしまいますよね

segments.text: Input buffering exists in this game, so it's unavoidable
segments.original_text: 先行入力ってものがこのゲームに存在してますから仕方ないところではあります

segments.text: Skillfully using the input buffer mechanics, the action flows systematically
segments.original_text: さあ先行入力の仕様も巧みに活かしてシステマチックに流れる展開でありました

segments.text: But the color scheme is really nice, huh?
segments.original_text: ただ色はかなり良いですね

segments.text: Yeah, purple purple blue
segments.original_text: はい紫紫青

segments.text: Well, that's the classic setup
segments.original_text: まあ王道ですね

segments.text: If you secure the damage with purple, you can see the blue margin in that configuration too
segments.original_text: 紫で火力さえ取れれば青のマギリシスも見えてくるような配列です

segments.text: Going for the forward smash
segments.original_text: 横スマ通す気

segments.text: Down tilt into fair
segments.original_text: 下強から空中前

segments.text: And Shuton's catching up
segments.original_text: さあ追いついてきているShuton

segments.text: Parry
segments.original_text: ジャストシールド

segments.text: The down smash doesn't connect, but the down tilt sends them airborne
segments.original_text: 下スマ間に合わないが浮かせた下強

segments.text: If the forward dash had come out, I think Neo's shield would've broken
segments.original_text: 前ステップが出てたらネオ選手側のガードが割れていたと思います

segments.text: Right, right
segments.original_text: なるほどなるほど

segments.text: If you shield both hits of the down smash it breaks, right?
segments.original_text: 下スマの両方ガードすると割れるってやつですよね

segments.text: Yeah, that's it
segments.original_text: あそうですよ

segments.text: With the purple and all
segments.original_text: 紫みたいで

segments.text: There's a tech where if you hit from a slide, the shield gets pushed in and catches both Pikmin, breaking the guard
segments.original_text: 滑りから打つとガードがめり込んでピクミンに2匹とも当たってガードが割れてしまうというテクニックがありますので

segments.text: Is that the version they just used?
segments.original_text: それをねやった形でしょうか

segments.text: All those Pikmin that were there
segments.original_text: あれだけいたピクミンが

segments.text: In a flash
segments.original_text: 瞬く間に

segments.text: Are getting KO'd
segments.original_text: 殉職されていきます

segments.text: Neo's shield is also getting pretty depleted at this point, so
segments.original_text: ネオ選手側のガードもかなり減ってきているので

segments.text: I think we're at a point where guard-break back airs are very much viable
segments.original_text: ガード漏れの空後とかもかなり狙える展開ではなってきたと思うんですが

full_text: Whoa, that's a beautiful finish! Well, when you set up for a ledge tech, that getup naturally comes out regardless, right? Input buffering exists in this game, so it's unavoidable. Skillfully using the input buffer mechanics, the action flows systematically. But the color scheme is really nice, huh? Yeah, purple purple blue. Well, that's the classic setup. If you secure the damage with purple, you can see the blue margin in that configuration too. Going for the forward smash. Down tilt into fair. And Shuton's catching up. Parry. The down smash doesn't connect, but the down tilt sends them airborne. If the forward dash had come out, I think Neo's shield would've broken. Right, right. If you shield both hits of the down smash it breaks, right? Yeah, that's it. With the purple and all. There's a tech where if you hit from a slide, the shield gets pushed in and catches both Pikmin, breaking the guard. Is that the version they just used? All those Pikmin that were there. In a flash. Are getting KO'd. Neo's shield is also getting pretty depleted at this point, so. I think we're at a point where guard-break back airs are very much viable

corrections.original: システマチェックが流れる
corrections.corrected: システマチックに流れる
